title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at PolicyBazaar

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at PolicyBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Software Engineer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
